things.name: Hallasan National Park
things.description: UNESCO-listed dormant volcano at 1950m - the highest peak in South Korea

things.name: Manjanggul Lava Tube
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 13km lava tube with a 7m lava column - world's largest

things.name: Seongsan Ilchulbong (Sunrise Peak)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage volcanic tuff cone rising from the sea - spectacular sunrise views

things.name: Haenyeo Women Divers
things.description: UNESCO-listed tradition of female free divers harvesting seafood without tanks

things.name: Jeju Folk Village Museum
things.description: Preserved traditional Jeju village with 100 original thatched houses

things.name: Loveland Park
things.description: Outdoor sculpture park with 140 erotic artworks - adults only

things.name: O'Sulloc Tea Museum
things.description: Amorepacific's green tea museum and plantation amid scenic tea fields

things.name: Cheonjiyeon Waterfall
things.description: Triple-tiered waterfall in a lush subtropical gorge

things.name: Dongmun Traditional Market
things.description: Jeju's oldest market with black pork, tangerines, horse meat and local delicacies

things.name: Gimnyeong Maze Park
things.description: Famous hedge maze near the east coast with a traditional Jeju stone grandfather statue
